summary: Frontend-only testing of MAJOR layout redesign at /dashboard/create. Cover-flow preview strip (top) + bottom editor panel with toolbar + type switcher + toggle+input fields all working correctly. Three visual templates (intro cream, content sage, outro cream) render properly with brand footer, swipe pill, counter badge, CTA pill, social icons. **accent** word highlighting works. All 35+ test cases passed.
passed_tests: Page loads at /dashboard/create with demo user (localStorage.carouselex_demo_user)
Preview strip [data-testid=preview-strip] visible with all 6 slides (thumb-0..thumb-5)
Active slide (thumb-0) has purple outline (#6B4EFF, rgb(107, 78, 255))
Editor panel [data-testid=editor-panel] always visible (not conditional on selection)
Toolbar buttons present: reorder-prev-btn, delete-slide-btn, add-slide-btn, reorder-next-btn
Reorder← disabled on slide 1 (activeIdx === 0)
Reorder→ disabled on last slide (activeIdx === slides.length - 1)
Add Slide button → new slide appears, total becomes 7
Delete button (when >1 slide) → removes active slide
Reorder→ on slide 1 → swaps with slide 2, active index increments to 1
Slide 1 (intro) shows intro-type-tabs with 4 options: standard/emoji/headshot/image
Intro slide visual: cream bg (#F5F0E8), tagline 'A SHORT TAGLINE', title with 'Powerful' in teal (#7AB5A0), paragraph, brand footer, swipe pill
Click intro-type-emoji → emoji-picker appears with emoji tiles (emoji-🚀 etc)
Clicking emoji sets it in preview (large emoji above title)
Click intro-type-headshot → headshot-section with upload-headshot-btn + generate-headshot-btn (BETA label)
Click intro-type-image → image-picker with img-tab-search/generate/upload tabs
Image picker Search tab: suggest-terms-btn, img-search-input, search-image-btn, stock grid
Image picker orientation buttons: orient-horizontal, orient-vertical
Image picker scale buttons: scale-fit, scale-fill, scale-zoom-in, scale-zoom-out, scale-expand
Click thumb-1 (content slide) → editor switches to content-type-tabs (Text/Text+Image/Image)
Content slide visual: sage green bg (#7AB5A0), counter badge top-center with slide number, title with accent word in gold (#FFD27A)
Hide Counter toggle [data-testid=hide-counter-toggle] hides/shows counter badge
Click thumb-5 (outro) → editor switches to outro-type-tabs (Standard/Headshot/Image)
Outro slide visual: cream bg, tagline 'THE TAKEAWAY', title, paragraph, CTA pill 'Visit us at yourbrand.com', social icons
Toggle fields (field-toggle-tagline, field-toggle-title, field-toggle-body, field-toggle-swipe): purple switches present
Real-time binding: type into title-input → preview title updates live
**accent** markup: 'Your **Powerful** Hook' renders 'Powerful' in accent color
Brand footer: brand-name and brand-role inputs present
Design accordion [data-testid=accordion-design]: palette-editorial/nebula/aurora/sand/charcoal/coral/emerald; font-modern/editorial/mono/classic; bg-solid/gradient/grain

AI Actions accordion [data-testid=accordion-ai-actions]: ai-improve, ai-viral, ai-rewrite-hook, ai-simplify, ai-curiosity, regen-slide, hook-bold/story/controversial, flow-opt-btn, balance-btn, poll-btn
Export accordion [data-testid=accordion-export]: export-png, export-pdf, copy-img buttons
Cover-flow behavior: clicking thumb-N sets it as active (purple outline, larger size ~518px vs ~238px)
NO floating right panel (editor is inline at bottom)
Top bar: generate-btn, save-btn, copy-all-btn, topic-input, platform icons (linkedin/x/instagram/threads)
critical_code_review_comments: Cover-flow preview strip implementation is clean with scroll-snap and proper scaling (0.48 active, 0.22 inactive)
Three-template system (intro/content/outro) with role detection based on index works correctly
Toggle+input pattern with purple switches (#6B4EFF) is well-implemented
**accent** word highlighting via renderTitleWithAccent function works correctly
Design tokens properly applied: #6B4EFF purple accent, #F5F0E8 cream, #7AB5A0 sage, 12px border-radius
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for comprehensive test coverage
seed_data_creation: None needed - uses localStorage demo auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: MAJOR layout redesign complete and working. Cover-flow preview strip (top) shows all slides with active centered large + neighbors as smaller thumbs. Bottom editor panel has toolbar (Reorder/Delete/Add/Reorder) + per-slide-role type switcher tabs (Intro: 4 tabs, Content: 3 tabs, Outro: 3 tabs) + toggle+input fields with purple switches. Three visual templates: cream intro/outro with tagline+title+paragraph+brand footer+swipe pill; sage green content with counter badge; outro with CTA pill + social icons. **accent** word highlighting works. ImagePickerSubPanel reusable with Search/Generate/Upload tabs. Design/AI Actions/Export accordions retained. No floating right panel - editor is always inline at bottom.

.screenshots/07_outro_slide.png - Outro slide with CTA pill and social icons
.screenshots/09_ai_actions_accordion.png - AI Actions accordion with all buttons
.screenshots/11_toggle_and_binding.png - Real-time binding test with title update
